[[File:Radtrooper.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Radiation zone assault trooper|Radtroopers]] being supported by a repulsor scout.]]
'''Repulsor scouts''' were used as recon vehicles by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]], often in difficult and hazardous terrain.

They were armed with a [[Heavy repeating blaster/Legends|heavy repeating blaster]] located on the back of the vehicle, which could be accessed via a roof hatch. The [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] would stand behind the cannon on top of the vehicle, surrounded by railing.

Repulsor scouts had been used since before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], often accompanying [[Radiation zone assault trooper|Radtroopers]] in toxic environments.

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of the Mists]]'' {{1st}}
